title: MeshModeShape
description: MeshModeShape: Mesh mode shape at a discrete location in the Panel/FEMesh, normalised to 1.

UXX.description: Translational X component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UYY.description: Translational Y component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UZZ.description: Translational Z component of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RXX.description: Rotational component about the X-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RYY.description: Rotational component about the Y-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

RZZ.description: Rotational component about the Z-axis of the mode shape in global coordinates. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

LayerPosition.description: Position within the element thickness that result is extracted from, normalised to 1. I.e. 0 = lower surface, 0.5 = middle, 1 = top surface.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
